content:
🚀 unbrowse | Shell
🎯 Primary Use Case: To enable AI agents to interact with websites by automatically reverse-engineering and creating reusable API interfaces, making web automation faster, cheaper, and more efficient.
✨ Key Features: • Local MCP server and CLI • Auto-discovery of APIs from browser traffic • Generates reusable API interfaces (skills) on the fly
📖 Summary: Unbrowse is a local Model Context Protocol (MCP) server and CLI that transforms websites into reusable API interfaces for agents. It captures network traffic, reverse-engineers API endpoints, and stores learned information in a marketplace for instant reuse, significantly improving agent efficiency and reducing costs.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
